qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to run ambertools/23.5 on CPUs with StdEnv/2023?
qa_pairs.answer: To run ambertools/23.5 on CPUs with StdEnv/2023, you need to load `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 ambertools/23.5`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to run ambertools/23.5 on GPUs (CUDA) with StdEnv/2023?
qa_pairs.answer: To run ambertools/23.5 on GPUs with StdEnv/2023, you need to load `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 cuda/12.2 ambertools/23.5`.

qa_pairs.question: Are there any specific notes for ambertools/23.5 when used with StdEnv/2023?
qa_pairs.answer: No specific notes are provided for ambertools/23.5 when used with StdEnv/2023 in this context.

qa_pairs.question: Which AMBER versions are listed under the StdEnv/2020 tab for module loading?
qa_pairs.answer: Under the StdEnv/2020 tab, the listed AMBER versions are ambertools/21, amber/20.12-20.15, amber/20.9-20.15, and amber/18.14-18.17.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required for running ambertools/21 on CPUs within the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: For running ambertools/21 on CPUs within the StdEnv/2020 environment, you need `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 scipy-stack ambertools/21`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required for running ambertools/21 on GPUs (CUDA) within the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: For running ambertools/21 on GPUs (CUDA) within the StdEnv/2020 environment, you need `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.4 openmpi/4.0.3 scipy-stack ambertools/21`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the associated notes for ambertools/21 when using StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: The associated notes for ambertools/21 when using StdEnv/2020 are 'GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW'.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load amber/20.12-20.15 for CPU execution using StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: To load amber/20.12-20.15 for CPU execution using StdEnv/2020, you need `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/20.12-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load amber/20.12-20.15 for GPU (CUDA) execution using StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: To load amber/20.12-20.15 for GPU (CUDA) execution using StdEnv/2020, you need `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.4 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/20.12-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: What specific notes are relevant for amber/20.12-20.15 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: The specific notes for amber/20.12-20.15 under StdEnv/2020 are 'GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW'.

qa_pairs.question: Which modules should I load for amber/20.9-20.15 on CPUs with StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: For amber/20.9-20.15 on CPUs with StdEnv/2020, you should load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/20.9-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: Which modules should I load for amber/20.9-20.15 on GPUs (CUDA) with StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: For amber/20.9-20.15 on GPUs (CUDA) with StdEnv/2020, you should load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.0 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/20.9-20.15`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the notes for the amber/20.9-20.15 module when using StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: The notes for the amber/20.9-20.15 module when using StdEnv/2020 are 'GCC, MKL & FFTW'.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are necessary for amber/18.14-18.17 on CPUs when using StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: For amber/18.14-18.17 on CPUs when using StdEnv/2020, the necessary modules are `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 amber/18.14-18.17`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are necessary for amber/18.14-18.17 on GPUs (CUDA) when using StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: For amber/18.14-18.17 on GPUs (CUDA) when using StdEnv/2020, the necessary modules are `StdEnv/2020 gcc/8.4.0 cuda/10.2 openmpi/4.0.3`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the notes provided for amber/18.14-18.17 under the StdEnv/2020 configuration?
qa_pairs.answer: The notes provided for amber/18.14-18.17 under the StdEnv/2020 configuration are 'GCC, MKL'.
